$
Select Payment Method
Personal Info

To make a donation, follow these steps:

  1. Write a check payable to "Jusoor International"
  2. On the memo line of the check, indicate that the donation is for "Jusoor International"
  3. Mail your check to: "Jusoor International, Place de la Synagogue 2 - 1204, Geneva"

Your tax-deductible donation is greatly appreciated!

Donation Total: $100.00

OUR VISION AND BELIEFS

Jusoor envisions a world where every voice is heard
and every human right is upheld

Investigating and reporting undeniable violations of human rights
Leading interventions in emergency hotspots in the world

Freedom of expression and the fate of press freedom

We create lasting change in the lives of individuals and communities facing adversity

Through investigative journalism, timely humanitarian interventions, and impactful media advocacy, Jusoor uncovers human rights abuses, protects victims, and drives systemic change in the affected regions.

32,941

lives impacted since 2015

40%

displaced persons

70,000

persons in dire need of medical aid and interventions

100%

of your donations will go to persons in need

Panel talk – Unveiling refugee stories – June 28 2024

The dynamic, hybrid expert event “Unveiling Refugee Stories: Media & Advocacy Tactics” took place 28 June at the University of Geneva with participation in person and online of media professionals, development experts, legal practitioners, civil society solidarity actors, and persons with refugee experiences. 

Read more

AI and human rights ethical dilemmas – March 22 2024

The Symposium on AI and Citizenship commemorated 25 years of ICVolunteers with an insightful exploration of the ethical dimensions of AI in contemporary society. Held at the ICV Arcade in Geneva, the event featured a series of engaging panel discussions moderated by prominent experts in the field.

Read more

GET INVOLVED WITH JUSOOR

Focus areas

We tackle critical human rights issues and focus on enhancing media practices

Discover more

Programs

We are dedicated to achieving transformative impact through our three pillar programs

More details

Get Involved

Your contribution will make a real difference in the lives of those we serve

Explore more

About us

An international organization that works to develop positive practices related to media and human development, and contributes to promoting positive initiatives for all actors in the field of media and human development issues.
